summary.text: Provides extension methods for adding Redis resources to the application model.

members.name: AddRedis
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<RedisResource> RedisBuilderExtensions.AddRedis(this IDistributedApplicationBuilder builder, string name, int? port)

summary.text: Adds a Redis container to the application model.

children.text: This resource includes built-in health checks. When this resource is referenced as a dependency using the
extension method then the dependent resource will wait until the Redis resource is able to service requests.

remarks.text: This version of the package defaults to the

name.text: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

port.text: The host port to bind the underlying container to.

members.name: WithPersistence
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<RedisResource> RedisBuilderExtensions.WithPersistence(this IResourceBuilder<RedisResource> builder, TimeSpan? interval = null, long keysChangedThreshold = 1)

summary.text: Configures a Redis container resource for persistence.

remarks.text: to persist Redis data across sessions with custom persistence configuration, e.g.:

interval.text: The interval between snapshot exports. Defaults to 60 seconds.

keysChangedThreshold.text: The number of key change operations required to trigger a snapshot at the interval. Defaults to 1.
